mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reading_twins (user_id_a, user_id_b, similarity_score, common_count, last_calculated) VALUES ( LEAST(#{userIdA}, #{userIdB}), GREATEST(#{userIdA}, #{userIdB}), #{similarityScore}, #{commonCount}, NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (user_id_a, user_id_b) DO UPDATE SET similarity_score = EXCLUDED.similarity_score, common_count = EXCLUDED.common_count, last_calculated = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reading_twins WHERE user_id_a = LEAST(#{userIdA}, #{userIdB}) AND user_id_b = GREATEST(#{userIdA}, #{userIdB})

SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, COALESCE(sp.display_name, u.full_name) AS display_name, u.profile_picture_url, sp.tagline, COALESCE(sp.is_verified, FALSE) AS is_verified, rt.similarity_score, rt.common_count, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId} IS NOT NULL THEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM user_follows f WHERE f.follower_id = #{currentUserId} AND f.following_id = u.id) ELSE FALSE END AS is_following FROM reading_twins rt JOIN users u ON u.id = CASE WHEN rt.user_id_a = #{userId} THEN rt.user_id_b ELSE rt.user_id_a END LEFT JOIN user_social_profiles sp ON sp.user_id = u.id WHERE (rt.user_id_a = #{userId} OR rt.user_id_b = #{userId}) AND u.is_active = TRUE AND rt.similarity_score > 0.1 ORDER BY rt.similarity_score DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reading_twins WHERE (user_id_a = #{userId} OR user_id_b = #{userId}) AND similarity_score > 0.1

-- Users who read the same books/content as this user SELECT DISTINCT rp2.user_id FROM reading_progress rp1 JOIN reading_progress rp2 ON rp2.book_id = rp1.book_id AND rp2.user_id != #{userId} AND rp2.percentage_completed >= 10 WHERE rp1.user_id = #{userId} AND rp1.percentage_completed >= 10 UNION SELECT DISTINCT rp4.user_id FROM reading_progress rp3 JOIN reading_progress rp4 ON rp4.zine_id = rp3.zine_id AND rp4.user_id != #{userId} AND rp4.percentage_completed >= 10 WHERE rp3.user_id = #{userId} AND rp3.percentage_completed >= 10 LIMIT 500
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM reading_twins WHERE (user_id_a = #{userId} OR user_id_b = #{userId}) AND last_calculated < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
